brands.name: Adidas
brands.summary: 阿迪达斯是以“三条纹”建立全球高识别度的运动品牌，兼具专业性能、街头潮流与大众穿着场景。其视觉系统以黑白高对比、强图形符号和利落字形为核心，传递出经典、可靠、充满动能的品牌气质，同时通过联名与文化运营持续强化年轻化表达。

logo.description: 以三叶草与三条纹为核心识别，兼具字标与图形符号的全球统一体系。
logo.construction: 基于简洁字形与强识别图形的组合结构，依靠三条平行斜线与留白形成动态平衡，强化运动感与品牌记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: Built around the Trefoil and Three Stripes as core identifiers, a globally unified system combining wordmark and graphic symbol.
logo.constructionEn: A combination structure anchored in clean letterforms and highly recognizable graphics, using three parallel diagonal lines and negative space to create dynamic balance — reinforcing athletic energy and brand recall.

typography.heading: 无衬线粗体，偏几何感的品牌定制字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线体，清晰高可读性，适配电商与运动场景
typography.notes: 整体强调力量感、速度感与高识别度，字重对比明确。
typography.headingEn: Bold sans-serif, with a slightly geometric custom brand typeface
typography.bodyEn: Modern sans-serif, optimized for high readability across e-commerce and sport contexts
typography.notesEn: The system emphasizes power, speed, and strong recognition, with clear weight contrast throughout.

photography.lighting: 高对比自然光与硬朗棚拍混合，局部强调轮廓
photography.tone: 利落、真实、能量感、运动感
photography.composition: 中近景人物为主，动态姿态与大留白并存，常用强角度与品牌符号入镜
photography.lightingEn: A mix of high-contrast natural light and hard, directional studio lighting, with targeted emphasis on silhouette
photography.compositionEn: Mid- and close-range portraits featuring dynamic poses alongside generous negative space, frequently incorporating strong camera angles and brand symbols within the frame

brands.toneSummary: 经典运动美学，兼具专业与街头活力。
brands.positioning: 面向全球运动与潮流人群的顶级运动品牌，主张以专业性能连接日常穿着与自我表达。

targetUser.identity: 运动爱好者、城市年轻人、潮流消费者
targetUser.pain: 需要兼顾性能、舒适与风格表达的穿着解决方案
targetUser.scene: 训练、通勤、街头穿搭、休闲社交

sellingPoints: 三条纹与三叶草构成极强品牌识别系统
兼具运动科技、舒适脚感与日常穿搭属性
覆盖跑步、训练、足球、篮球与生活方式全场景
拥有长期运动文化与潮流联名资产
品牌历史深厚，兼具经典性与持续创新能力
brandTakeaway: 用粗体压缩无衬线字体强化标题运动感
采用单色基底搭配一个强调色的配色法则
每季度与文化IP推一次限量联名
首页采用70%中性色加30%品牌色布局
把鞋盒和快递包装统一印上品牌符号
brandTakeawayEn: Use bold, condensed sans-serif type to amplify the athletic feel of headlines
Build color systems around a monochrome base paired with a single accent color
Release a limited collaboration with a cultural IP each season
Structure the homepage around a 70% neutral to 30% brand color ratio
Unify shoeboxes and shipping packaging with consistent brand symbols
brands.summaryEn: Adidas is a global sports brand that built its iconic recognition around the Three Stripes, uniting professional performance, street culture, and everyday wearability. Its visual system is anchored in high-contrast black and white, bold graphic symbols, and sharp, confident typography — delivering a brand presence that feels classic, reliable, and full of kinetic energy. Through ongoing collaborations and cultural activations, it continuously reinforces a youthful, expressive edge.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Classic sports aesthetic that bridges professional performance with street-level energy.
brands.positioningEn: A top-tier global sports brand for athletes and culture-driven consumers, connecting professional performance to daily wear and self-expression.
sellingPointsEn: Three Stripes and Trefoil form an exceptionally strong brand recognition system
Combines sports technology, comfort, and everyday styling in one product line
Covers the full spectrum of running, training, football, basketball, and lifestyle
Built on a deep heritage of sports culture and high-profile collaborations
A storied brand history that balances classic credibility with continuous innovation

targetUserEn.identity: Sports enthusiasts, urban youth, style-driven consumers
targetUserEn.pain: A need for wardrobe solutions that balance performance, comfort, and personal style
targetUserEn.scene: Training, commuting, street styling, casual social occasions

brands.name: Apple
brands.summary: “Apple”以极简设计和强生态协同建立全球高端科技心智。其视觉语言高度统一，依托简洁标志、克制色彩与明亮产品影像，持续传递“易用、先进、可信赖”的品牌印象，并通过软硬件整合强化用户粘性与溢价能力。

logo.description: 被咬一口的苹果轮廓，极简且高度识别。
logo.construction: 以单一外轮廓为核心，利用负形切口形成“咬痕”，强调几何简化与符号记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: A bitten apple silhouette—minimalist and instantly recognizable.
logo.constructionEn: Built around a single outer contour, the negative-space cut forms the signature "bite," emphasizing geometric simplification and strong symbolic memorability.

typography.heading: SF Pro Display
typography.notes: 无衬线、字重层级清晰、字面现代克制，强调高可读性与系统一致性。
typography.notesEn: Sans-serif typefaces with a clear weight hierarchy and a modern, restrained character—prioritizing high readability and system-wide consistency.

photography.lighting: 柔和高质感布光，常见大面积均匀补光与干净高光。
photography.composition: 大留白、产品居中或偏轴对称，突出单品轮廓与材质细节。
photography.lightingEn: Soft, high-quality lighting, typically featuring broad, even fill and clean highlights.
photography.compositionEn: Generous negative space with the product centered or placed off-center along a symmetrical axis, emphasizing silhouette and material detail.

brands.toneSummary: 以极简语言传递高端科技体验。
brands.positioning: 以软硬件一体化体验为核心的高端消费电子与生态品牌。

targetUser.identity: 城市白领、创意工作者、学生及科技爱好者
targetUser.pain: 希望设备简单易用、审美统一、生态联动顺畅
targetUser.scene: 办公、创作、通勤、娱乐与日常生活

sellingPoints: 软硬件与服务生态高度协同
工业设计极简且辨识度强
操作体验统一、上手门槛低
品牌审美稳定，具备强烈身份表达
产品线覆盖多场景，形成生态闭环
brandTakeaway: 把首页首屏主图放大到占屏80%,文案缩至单行
详情页每屏只讲一个卖点,字号统一缩到14px
底部新增 ecosystem 联动区,串联至少3款产品
把全站色板从6色压缩到黑白+1个强调蓝
导航项从8个砍到4个,只留核心场景入口
brandTakeawayEn: Scale the homepage hero image to occupy 80% of the screen and condense copy to a single line
On detail pages, dedicate each screen to a single selling point and standardize font size to 14px
Add an ecosystem connection zone at the bottom linking at least three products
Compress the site-wide palette from six colors to black, white, plus one accent blue
Trim the navigation from eight items down to four, keeping only core scenario entry points
brands.summaryEn: Apple has built a globally recognized premium-tech mindset through minimalist design and tightly integrated ecosystem synergy. Its visual language is highly consistent—relying on a simple logo, restrained color palette, and bright product imagery—to consistently convey a brand impression of "effortless, advanced, and trustworthy," while reinforcing user stickiness and premium pricing power through seamless hardware-software integration.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Premium tech experiences expressed through minimalist language.
brands.positioningEn: A premium consumer electronics and ecosystem brand built around integrated hardware-software experiences.
sellingPointsEn: Tightly coordinated hardware, software, and services ecosystem
Minimalist industrial design with strong brand recognition
Unified user experience with low learning curve
Consistent brand aesthetic with powerful identity expression
Multi-scenario product lineup forming a closed ecosystem loop

targetUserEn.identity: Urban white-collar professionals, creative workers, students, and tech enthusiasts
targetUserEn.pain: Want devices that are intuitive to use, visually cohesive, and seamlessly connected across the ecosystem
targetUserEn.scene: Office, creative work, commuting, entertainment, and everyday life

brands.name: Google
brands.tagline: Don't be evil. Make the world's information universally accessible and useful.
brands.summary: Google 是全球最大的搜索引擎与人工智能平台之一,以四大基础色的极简几何标志、Material Design 设计语言和无缝衔接的跨产品生态,把"信息普惠"做成现代互联网的基础设施。

logo.description: 由蓝、红、黄、蓝、绿、红六色组成的 Google 字标,字母基于严谨的几何圆形与拱形结构,圆润、平衡、亲切。
logo.descriptionEn: The Google wordmark composed of blue, red, yellow, blue, green, and red. The letterforms are built on precise geometric circles and arches, rounded, balanced, and approachable.
logo.construction: 以圆和半圆为基本单元,通过精确的几何网格对齐每个字母;G 的弧形缺口与双层结构是识别关键。
logo.constructionEn: Built from circles and half-circles as the basic units, with each letter aligned to a precise geometric grid. The arc notch and double-layer structure of the G are key recognition cues.

typography.heading: Product Sans / Google Sans Display
typography.notes: 无衬线、几何化、字重阶梯清晰;优化屏幕阅读体验,支持 100+ 语言。
typography.notesEn: Sans-serif, geometric, with a clear weight scale; optimized for on-screen readability and supporting 100+ languages.

photography.style: 真实、多元、自然,贴近日常生活
photography.styleEn: Authentic, diverse, and natural, rooted in everyday life
photography.lighting: 自然光为主,高调柔和,避免戏剧化阴影
photography.lightingEn: Natural light as the foundation, bright and soft, avoiding dramatic shadows
photography.composition: 开放式构图,人物真实,弱化摆拍,强调人与产品的自然互动
photography.compositionEn: Open compositions with real people, minimal posing, emphasizing natural interaction between people and product

brands.toneSummary: 谷歌的视觉语调像一个永远穿着彩色T恤的工程师:专业但不冷峻,智能但不疏离,把复杂的技术包装成轻松、可点击的日常体验。
brands.positioning: 全球信息入口与 AI 时代操作系统,以"普惠+智能+开放"构建从搜索到云端的全栈数字底座。

targetUser.identity: 全球互联网用户、学生、开发者、中小企业主与广告主
targetUser.identityZh: 全球互联网用户、学生、开发者、中小企业主与广告主
targetUser.pain: 信息过载、跨工具切换成本高、复杂任务缺乏一体化智能助手
targetUser.painZh: 信息过载、跨工具切换成本高、复杂任务缺乏一体化智能助手
targetUser.scene: 日常搜索、办公协作、出行导航、学习研究、内容消费
targetUser.sceneZh: 日常搜索、办公协作、出行导航、学习研究、内容消费

sellingPoints: 全球领先的信息检索与生成式 AI(Gemini)能力
覆盖搜索、办公、地图、视频、安卓的完整产品生态
以 Material Design 为代表的人本化设计语言
持续创新驱动未来科技普惠与无障碍体验
开放平台连接亿万用户、开发者与广告主
brandTakeaway: 把主 logo 拆成蓝红黄绿四色模块化设计
给每个子产品分配独立品牌色建立识别
首页采用纯白底配 60% 留白降低噪音
按钮统一用 8px 圆角配阴影提升触感
主 CTA 用 #4285F4 蓝配 #202124 深灰文字
brandTakeawayEn: Break the primary logo into modular blue, red, yellow, and green color blocks
Assign each sub-product an independent brand color to build recognition
Use a pure white homepage background with 60% negative space to reduce visual noise
Standardize buttons with 8px rounded corners and subtle shadows to add tactile warmth
Use #4285F4 blue as the primary CTA paired with #202124 deep gray text
brands.summaryEn: Google is one of the world's largest search engines and AI platforms, turning "information for everyone" into the infrastructure of the modern internet through a minimalist geometric logo in four core colors, the Material Design language, and a seamlessly connected cross-product ecosystem.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Google's visual voice reads like an engineer who always wears a colorful T-shirt: expert without being cold, intelligent without being aloof, wrapping complex technology into light, clickable everyday experiences.
brands.positioningEn: The global gateway to information and the operating system of the AI era, building a full-stack digital foundation from search to cloud on the pillars of "accessibility + intelligence + openness."
sellingPointsEn: World-leading information retrieval and generative AI capabilities (Gemini)
A complete product ecosystem spanning Search, Workspace, Maps, YouTube, and Android
A human-centered design language led by Material Design
Continuous innovation driving the democratization of future technology and accessible experiences
An open platform connecting billions of users, developers, and advertisers

targetUserEn.identity: Global internet users, students, developers, small and medium business owners, and advertisers
targetUserEn.pain: Information overload, high switching costs across tools, and a lack of integrated intelligent assistants for complex tasks
targetUserEn.scene: Daily search, office collaboration, travel navigation, learning and research, and content consumption

brands.name: Hatch
brands.tagline: Providing modern families with full-cycle sleep solutions from pregnancy to age 12
brands.summary: Hatch 创立于硅谷，最初以智能婴儿监护器切入育儿场景，后逐步将产品扩展到 Rest 智能声光机、Restore 成人睡眠灯、孕期到学龄的成长型灯具矩阵。品牌以一套统一的现代极简视觉语言串联 0-12 岁的家庭睡眠场景，用 App 作为情感与控制的中枢，把冷冰冰的智能硬件转译为"陪伴"。其设计哲学强调"少即是多"：鼠尾草绿、陶土橙、奶油白构成的克制色板，与真实家庭生活摄影共同塑造了科技、人文、温柔三者并存的现代育儿品牌气质。

logo.description: 全小写无衬线字标，'a' 字母采用极简几何构造，整体圆润但带科技感
logo.construction: 几何无衬线字形，'a' 内部留白近似圆形，'h' 与 't' 收尾有微小切角，形成柔和却克制的家族标识
logo.descriptionEn: All-lowercase sans-serif wordmark with a minimalist geometric 'a' and an overall rounded yet tech-forward feel
logo.constructionEn: Geometric sans-serif forms; the counter of the 'a' approaches a circle; the 'h' and 't' feature subtle cut terminals, creating a soft yet restrained family mark

typography.heading: 现代几何无衬线（近似 Söhne / Inter 风格）
typography.body: 同系无衬线，字重层级丰富
typography.notes: 全篇以小写为主，字距宽松，营造松弛、亲近的现代感
typography.headingEn: Modern geometric sans-serif (in the style of Söhne / Inter)
typography.bodyEn: Same-family sans-serif with a rich weight hierarchy
typography.notesEn: Predominantly lowercase throughout with generous letter-spacing, creating a relaxed, approachable modern feel

photography.lighting: 自然柔光，多为晨昏室内窗光
photography.composition: 中近景人物+产品共处，背景生活化，不刻意摆拍
photography.lightingEn: Natural soft light, mostly indoor window light at dawn or dusk
photography.compositionEn: Medium and close-up shots of people alongside products, lived-in backgrounds, no forced posing

brands.toneSummary: 把智能硬件做出母亲体温的科技陪伴品牌
brands.positioning: 为 0-12 岁家庭提供以睡眠为核心的智能硬件 + 内容生态，让科技成为日常陪伴

targetUser.identity: 注重生活品质的城市新手父母与年轻家庭
targetUser.pain: 既要科学育儿又要保留自己的生活节奏，缺乏不打扰的睡眠解决方案
targetUser.scene: 哄睡、夜醒、起夜、睡前阅读、远程安抚、孕期助眠

sellingPoints: 全周期产品矩阵：覆盖孕期到 12 岁的灯具与声光产品
App 单一入口：整合白噪音、灯光编程、远程哄睡、睡眠数据
统一设计语言：跨 SKU 保持家族脸谱，配件可迭代不换风格
真实生活摄影：不渲染完美父母，强化"陪伴而非控制"心智
科技藏在温柔里：智能功能不暴露于产品外观，情绪价值优先
brandTakeaway: 把所有产品功能整合进一个 App，移除独立控制入口
建立跨 SKU 家族设计语言，配件迭代不改主轮廓
将产品摄影从精修棚拍换成家庭真实生活抓拍
把科技功能藏进材质触感，弱化 LED 屏幕外露
主色从冷调蓝灰换成鼠尾草绿+陶土橙组合
brandTakeawayEn: Move all product controls into one app
Lock a family silhouette across all SKUs
Swap studio shots for candid home photos
Hide tech in soft-touch materials
Swap blue-gray for sage and terracotta
brands.summaryEn: Founded in Silicon Valley, Hatch first entered the parenting space with a smart baby monitor, then gradually expanded its product line to include the Rest smart sound machine, Restore adult sleep light, and a growing lamp matrix spanning pregnancy through school age. The brand ties together sleep scenarios for families with children aged 0-12 through a unified modern minimalist visual language, using the app as the emotional and control hub to translate cold smart hardware into 'companionship.' Its design philosophy emphasizes 'less is more': a restrained palette of sage green, terracotta, and cream white, paired with real family-life photography, shapes a modern parenting brand identity where technology, humanity, and warmth coexist.
brands.toneSummaryEn: A smart companion brand that gives hardware a mother's warmth
brands.positioningEn: Providing smart hardware + content ecosystem centered on sleep for families with children aged 0-12, making technology part of everyday companionship
sellingPointsEn: Full-lifecycle product matrix: lamps and sound-light products covering pregnancy through age 12
Single app entry point: integrating white noise, light programming, remote soothing, and sleep data
Unified design language: family resemblance across SKUs, with accessories that evolve without changing style
Real-life photography: no idealized parents, reinforcing 'companionship over control'
Technology hidden in warmth: smart features concealed from the product exterior, emotional value first

targetUserEn.identity: Quality-of-life-conscious urban new parents and young families
targetUserEn.pain: Wanting both science-based parenting and their own personal rhythm, with no non-intrusive sleep solutions available
targetUserEn.scene: Bedtime soothing, night waking, nighttime rising, pre-sleep reading, remote comfort, pregnancy sleep aid

brands.name: Nike
brands.summary: 耐克是以“Swoosh”和“Just Do It”构建全球识别的运动品牌。它用极简黑白体系、强动势摄影和明星运动员矩阵，把专业性能、竞技精神与街头时尚合为一体，形成兼具传播力与产品力的超级品牌资产。

logo.description: 以“Swoosh”弧形勾标构成，极简却具强运动张力，常与字标组合使用。
logo.construction: 由单一流线几何构成，依靠负形、速度感曲线与高识别轮廓建立记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: Built on the Swoosh — a fluid arc mark that is minimalist yet charged with athletic momentum, often paired with the wordmark.
logo.constructionEn: Formed by a single streamlined geometry, building memorability through negative space, speed-driven curves, and a high-recognition silhouette.

typography.heading: 粗体无衬线，偏 Condensed 运动广告字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线体系，接近系统字体与品牌定制字重结合
typography.notes: 标题强调力量与速度，正文保持高可读和商业化传播效率。
typography.headingEn: Bold sans-serif, leaning toward a condensed athletic ad typeface
typography.bodyEn: A modern sans-serif system, blending near-system fonts with brand-customized weights
typography.notesEn: Headlines emphasize power and speed; body copy stays highly legible and built for commercial communication.

photography.lighting: 高对比硬光与均匀柔光并用，强调肌肉线条与产品细节
photography.tone: 高对比、动势强、冷暖并置、真实竞技感
photography.composition: 大特写、低机位、斜线构图与留白并行，突出动作瞬间
photography.lightingEn: High-contrast hard light paired with even soft light, emphasizing muscle definition and product detail
photography.toneEn: High contrast, strong momentum, juxtaposed warm and cool tones, authentic competitive feel
photography.compositionEn: Extreme close-ups, low angles, diagonal compositions alongside negative space, capturing peak action moments

brands.toneSummary: 以极简符号承载高强度运动表达。
brands.positioning: 面向全球运动人群的头部运动品牌，以产品科技与精神激励驱动消费。

targetUser.identity: 专业运动员、健身人群与年轻运动消费群
targetUser.pain: 需要兼顾性能、风格与身份表达，同时渴望被激励和认可
targetUser.scene: 训练、比赛、通勤、街头穿搭与日常运动生活

sellingPoints: Swoosh 与“Just Do It”形成极强品牌联想与传播资产。
覆盖跑步、篮球、训练、生活方式等全场景运动产品线。
长期绑定顶级运动员与赛事资源，强化专业背书。
在材料、缓震、支撑与轻量化上持续迭代产品科技。
把运动表现转译为街头时尚，兼顾功能与审美。
brandTakeaway: 把品牌slogan从长句压缩到3个单词
主色锁定黑+白+一个高饱和强调色
每季度发布一次核心技术升级公告
签约3位细分运动领域KOL做长代言
推出与街头品牌联名的限量胶囊系列
brandTakeawayEn: Compress the brand slogan from a long line into three words
Lock the primary palette to black, white, and one high-saturation accent color
Release a core technology upgrade announcement every quarter
Sign three niche-sport KOLs for long-term endorsement
Launch limited-edition capsule collections in collaboration with streetwear brands
brands.summaryEn: Nike is a global sports brand built on the universal recognition of the Swoosh and 'Just Do It.' Through a minimalist black-and-white system, high-velocity photography, and a star-athlete roster, it fuses professional performance, competitive spirit, and street culture into a brand asset that delivers both cultural reach and product power.
brands.toneSummaryEn: High-intensity athletic expression carried by minimalist symbols.
brands.positioningEn: A leading global sports brand targeting athletes worldwide, driving purchase through product technology and the power of motivation.
sellingPointsEn: The Swoosh and 'Just Do It' form an exceptionally strong brand association and communication asset.
A full-spectrum product line covering running, basketball, training, and lifestyle.
Long-term partnerships with elite athletes and premier sporting events reinforce a professional endorsement.
Continuous iteration of product technology in materials, cushioning, support, and lightweight construction.
Translates athletic performance into street fashion, balancing function and aesthetic.

targetUserEn.identity: Professional athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and younger sports consumers
targetUserEn.pain: Need to balance performance, style, and identity expression, while craving motivation and recognition
targetUserEn.scene: Training, competition, commuting, streetwear styling, and everyday active life

brands.name: Nintendo
brands.summary: 从京都一家花札作坊到全球游戏霸主，任天堂用 130 多年时间只做了一件事：让游戏回归"玩"本身。Switch 的混合形态打破了主机与掌机的边界，Wii 的体感重新定义了大人的客厅，而马里奥、林克、皮卡丘组成的 IP 宇宙则成为几代人共同的童年记忆。它的视觉语言从不是参数堆砌，而是用最克制的红白配色、最圆润的无衬线字体，传递一种"全年龄友好"的温度。

logo.description: 白色圆润无衬线字"Nintendo"嵌入红色椭圆胶囊框
logo.construction: 红底胶囊是主图形，白色字形作为负空间嵌入，胶囊弧度与字形圆角严格呼应，形成"圆中圆"的几何闭环
logo.descriptionEn: Rounded white sans-serif wordmark 'Nintendo' set inside a red oval capsule
logo.constructionEn: The red capsule is the primary shape, with the white letterform embedded as negative space; the capsule's curvature echoes the letterforms' rounded geometry, creating a closed 'circle within a circle' system

typography.heading: Nintendo 自有定制圆体（Nintendo Sans 系，推测为 Futura/Round Gothic 改良）
typography.body: Nintendo Sans / Noto Sans 系列
typography.notes: 所有字形弧度与红胶囊呼应，标题禁止使用衬线与极细字形
typography.headingEn: Nintendo's custom rounded typeface (Nintendo Sans family, likely a Futura/Round Gothic refinement)
typography.notesEn: All letterform curvature echoes the red capsule; serif and ultra-thin weights are prohibited for headlines

photography.lighting: 高亮柔光、整体曝光偏亮，几乎不见硬阴影
photography.composition: 手部特写 + 半身人物为主，主体永远居中，背景留出品牌色块
photography.lightingEn: Bright, soft, overall high-exposure lighting with virtually no hard shadows
photography.compositionEn: Hand close-ups and half-body subjects, always centered, with brand-color blocks reserved in the background

brands.toneSummary: 童趣与匠心并重，让游戏回归家庭与欢乐
brands.positioning: 以独创的硬件 + 第一方 IP，为全年龄段创造笑容与同屏时光

targetUser.identity: 家庭玩家、核心粉丝、怀旧青年
targetUser.pain: 想要不复杂、不暴力、可与家人共享的高品质娱乐
targetUser.scene: 客厅同屏、旅途掌机、朋友聚会

sellingPoints: 马里奥/塞尔达/宝可梦构成的独家 IP 宇宙
Switch 主机 + 掌机混合形态，场景无缝切换
第一方工作室出品，质量与口碑稳定
全家可玩的内容分级策略，覆盖最广人群
百年企业沉淀的工艺感与品牌信任
brandTakeaway: 将品牌主色锁定在单一高饱和红(#E60012)
建立四档全家可玩的内容分级体系
推出至少3款撞色配色SKU打破黑白单调
构建至少3个跨品类的独家IP角色宇宙
把旗舰做成家用+便携无缝切换的双模设备
brandTakeawayEn: Lock the brand color to a single high-saturation red (#E60012)
Build a four-tier family-friendly content rating system
Launch at least three color-clash SKU options to break the black-and-white monotony
Develop IP character universes spanning at least three product categories
Design flagship hardware as a dual-mode device that switches seamlessly between home and portable play
brands.summaryEn: From a hanafuda card workshop in Kyoto to a global gaming powerhouse, Nintendo has spent over 130 years doing one thing: bringing play back to the heart of gaming. The Switch's hybrid form erased the line between console and handheld, the Wii's motion controls redefined the adult living room, and an IP universe of Mario, Link, and Pikachu has become shared childhood memories for generations. Its visual language has never been about spec sheets—it's about the most restrained red-and-white palette, the most rounded sans-serif letterforms, and an all-ages warmth that feels like home.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Where childlike wonder meets meticulous craft—putting play back into family and shared joy
brands.positioningEn: Pioneering hardware plus first-party IP that creates smiles and shared screen time for every generation
sellingPointsEn: An exclusive IP universe built on Mario, Zelda, and Pokémon
A hybrid console-plus-handheld form factor for seamless play anywhere
First-party studio output with consistent quality and reputation
An all-family content rating system that reaches the widest audience
Over a century of craftsmanship and brand trust

targetUserEn.identity: Family gamers, core fans, nostalgia-driven adults
targetUserEn.pain: Wanting high-quality entertainment that isn't complex or violent and can be shared with family
targetUserEn.scene: Living room co-op, travel handheld play, friend gatherings

brands.name: Oura
brands.tagline: One ring. Your body, quantified around the clock.
brands.summary: Oura 由芬兰奥卢的一群科学家与设计师在 2013 年创立，2018 年正式推出消费级 Oura Ring。品牌以"无屏幕 + 单指环"形态切入可穿戴市场，用 Readiness Score、睡眠分期、HRV 等医疗级指标取代步数与卡路里的浅层叙事，将产品定位为"可佩戴的健康数据伙伴"。视觉上坚持北欧极简与珠宝级材质，目标是高知高压职业人群的长期健康优化。

logo.description: 全小写无衬线字标 "oura"，O 字母保持正圆
logo.construction: 几何正圆 O + 简洁小写字母，弱化装饰，靠负空间和字怀传递冷静感
logo.descriptionEn: All-lowercase sans-serif wordmark 'oura', with the O kept as a perfect circle
logo.constructionEn: Geometric perfect-circle O paired with simple lowercase letterforms, minimal ornamentation—letting negative space and counters carry the cool restraint

typography.heading: 自研无衬线，接近 Söhne / GT America 风格，字怀宽、字重对比强
typography.body: 同一字族细体，强调留白与节奏
typography.notes: 全大写小标题配合大字号行距，关键词加粗形成"呼吸感节奏"
typography.headingEn: Custom sans-serif in the spirit of Söhne / GT America, with wide counters and strong weight contrast
typography.bodyEn: Thin weights from the same family, emphasizing whitespace and pacing
typography.notesEn: All-caps subheads paired with generous line-height on large sizes; key terms bolded to create a breathing rhythm

photography.lighting: 柔和自然光、低对比度，偶用金色时段
photography.tone: 暖中性、低饱和、米杏与沙色主导
photography.composition: 大量负空间、近景手部与指环特写，弱化人脸
photography.lightingEn: Soft natural light, low contrast, with occasional golden-hour
photography.toneEn: Warm-neutral, low saturation, dominated by beige and sand
photography.compositionEn: Generous negative space, close-ups of hands and the ring, with faces deliberately downplayed

brands.toneSummary: 以北欧极简与珠宝质感传递医学级的健康洞察
brands.positioning: 无屏幕全天候的健康数据伙伴，专为追求长期身心优化的精英用户打造

targetUser.identity: 高知职业人 / 睡眠优化者 / 生物黑客
targetUser.pain: 手表干扰睡眠、难以量化恢复状态、想要深度健康洞察
targetUser.scene: 夜间睡眠监测、高压工作后的恢复评估、晨间例行打卡

sellingPoints: 无屏幕单指环形态，整夜佩戴无感
睡眠分期与 Readiness Score 接近医学级精度
7 天超长续航，充电间隙极短
钛金属 + 类钻镀层，珠宝级材质 SKU
数据在本地+云端双端加密，强调隐私
brandTakeaway: 砍掉产品屏幕，让所有数据回收到 App 端呈现
上线珠宝盒式礼盒包装，首屏放 15 秒拆盒视频
首页只露一个 AI 复合得分，把原始数据藏到二级页
首屏 hero 大字直接写'7 天续航'一句
设置页加显眼'本地加密'状态徽章
brandTakeawayEn: Strip the product screen; let all data surface inside the app
Launch jewelry-box-style gift packaging, with a 15-second unboxing video on the first screen
Homepage reveals only one AI composite score; bury raw data in secondary pages
Hero headline on the first screen should simply read '7-day battery'
Add a prominent 'Locally Encrypted' status badge in the settings view
brands.summaryEn: Oura was founded in 2013 by a group of scientists and designers in Oulu, Finland, and launched its consumer-grade Oura Ring in 2018. The brand enters the wearables market with a screen-free, single-ring form factor, replacing the shallow narratives of step counts and calories with medical-grade metrics like Readiness Score, sleep staging, and HRV—positioning the product as a wearable health data companion. Visually, it stays true to Nordic minimalism and jewelry-grade materials, targeting knowledge workers and high-pressure professionals in pursuit of long-term health optimization.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Conveying medical-grade health insight through Nordic minimalism and jewelry-grade materiality
brands.positioningEn: A screen-free, always-on health data companion, crafted for elite users pursuing long-term physical and mental optimization
sellingPointsEn: Screen-free single-ring form factor, imperceptible through the night
Sleep staging and Readiness Score approaching medical-grade precision
Up to 7-day battery life with minimal charging downtime
Titanium and diamond-like coating, jewelry-grade material SKUs
Data encrypted both locally and in the cloud, with a strong emphasis on privacy

targetUserEn.pain: Smartwatches disrupt sleep; recovery state is hard to quantify; craving deeper health insight
targetUserEn.scene: Overnight sleep monitoring, post-stress recovery assessment, morning check-in ritual

brands.name: PlayStation
brands.summary: PlayStation 是索尼旗下的全球主机游戏品牌，以强烈的视觉识别、丰富独占内容与稳定硬件性能建立行业标杆。它既是硬核玩家的娱乐入口，也是连接游戏、影音与社交体验的数字平台，品牌气质偏科技、沉浸、年轻且极具未来感。

logo.description: 由红黄蓝绿四色立体“PS”字标与简洁英文名共同构成，识别度极强。
logo.construction: 以几何切面和负形叠压形成“P/S”错视结构，强调体块、透视和色彩分层。
logo.descriptionEn: Composed of a three-dimensional 'PS' wordmark in red, yellow, blue, and green, paired with a clean English logotype, delivering exceptional recognizability.
logo.constructionEn: Uses geometric facets and negative-space layering to create an optical 'P/S' illusion structure, emphasizing volumetric blocks, perspective, and color stratification.

typography.heading: 无衬线体，偏几何感，接近定制化品牌字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线系统字体，常见于数字产品界面
typography.notes: 整体呈现科技、简洁、国际化，标题更强调力量感与空间感。
typography.headingEn: Sans-serif, geometric in feel, close to a customized brand typeface
typography.bodyEn: Modern sans-serif system fonts, commonly seen in digital product interfaces
typography.notesEn: The overall feel is tech-driven, clean, and international, with headings emphasizing strength and spatial presence.

photography.lighting: 高对比冷光，辅以局部霓虹或屏幕发光
photography.composition: 中心构图与大留白并存，常用机身特写、游戏场景联动和动态视觉切片
photography.lightingEn: High-contrast cool light, accented with localized neon or screen-glow effects
photography.compositionEn: Centered framing balanced with generous negative space, frequently featuring product close-ups, in-game scene integration, and dynamic visual slices

brands.toneSummary: 以科技驱动沉浸娱乐，兼具未来感与潮流识别。
brands.positioning: 全球领先的互动娱乐游戏平台，连接主机、内容与玩家生态。

targetUser.identity: 核心游戏玩家、主机用户、数字娱乐消费者
targetUser.pain: 追求高质量游戏体验、沉浸式性能与独占内容
targetUser.scene: 居家主机娱乐、在线联机、内容消费与社交分享

sellingPoints: 强大的主机性能与稳定的图形表现
丰富的独占游戏与第一方内容生态
成熟的在线联机与数字商店体系
标志性的品牌符号与跨代际认知
将游戏、影视、社交娱乐融为一体
brandTakeaway: 将品牌符号三角圆叉方做成可触摸的物理按键
主色锁定深蓝+纯白+黑三色，限制辅助色不超过2种
在产品包装上重复logo至少3次强化记忆点
把独占IP放在首屏banner左上角位置
跨代际保留核心图形，仅迭代次要细节
brandTakeawayEn: Turn the brand's iconic triangle, circle, cross, and square symbols into tangible physical buttons
Lock the core palette to deep blue, pure white, and black, limiting accent colors to no more than two
Reinforce the logo with at least three repetitions on product packaging to strengthen memory cues
Place exclusive IP titles in the top-left position of the homepage banner
Preserve core graphics across generations, iterating only on secondary details
brands.summaryEn: PlayStation is Sony's global console gaming brand, setting the industry benchmark with its strong visual identity, rich exclusive content, and reliable hardware performance. It serves as both a hardcore gaming portal and a digital platform connecting games, entertainment, and social experiences, with a brand personality that is tech-forward, immersive, youthful, and distinctly futuristic.
brands.toneSummaryEn: Tech-driven immersive entertainment, blending futuristic appeal with iconic brand recognition.
brands.positioningEn: A globally leading interactive entertainment and gaming platform that connects consoles, content, and the player ecosystem.
sellingPointsEn: Powerful console performance and stable graphics rendering
Rich library of exclusive titles and first-party content ecosystem
Mature online multiplayer and digital storefront infrastructure
Iconic brand symbols with cross-generational recognition
Seamless integration of gaming, film, and social entertainment

targetUserEn.identity: Core gamers, console users, and digital entertainment consumers
targetUserEn.pain: Seeking high-quality gaming experiences, immersive performance, and exclusive content
targetUserEn.scene: At-home console entertainment, online multiplayer, content consumption, and social sharing
